name: @commander/kernel
description: Commander execution kernel — shared durable runs, leases, idempotency, outbox, and recovery (Architecture V2)

scripts.test: pnpm --workspace-root exec tsx --test packages/kernel/src/kernel.test.ts packages/kernel/src/transitionValidation.test.ts packages/kernel/src/tenantPause.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ws2-acceptance.test.ts packages/kernel/src/contracts.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/compensationConsumer.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/compensationConsumerDaemon.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/compensationReclaimConsume.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/healthServer.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/opsRuntime.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/reclaimDaemon.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/timerWakeupWorker.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/outbox/kernelOutboxPublisher.test.ts packages/kernel/src/ops/outbox/outboxDelivery.test.ts
